narrative.headline: 2018 Nissan Sentra: transmission and brakes lead owner complaints
narrative.summary: Across 183 owner complaints to NHTSA, power train issues lead at 45 reports (25%) — owners describe the car losing the ability to move forward and needing transmission work. Service brakes follow at 40 reports (22%) and carry the most safety incidents: 3 crashes, 2 fires, and 1 injury. Engine reports (12%) include 2 fires.

issues.sample: STOPPED GOING FORWARD WHEN AT TRAFFIC LIGHT WILL ONLY GO IN REVERSE.  DEALERSHIP SAYS WARRANTY IS UP AND IT WILL COST 4000$  TO FIX.   I AM CONFUSED AS TO HOW A CAR THAT WAS BOUGHT 4/20/2018  HAS THE NEED FOR THE TRANSMISSIOM TO BE REPLACED.  THIS CAR HAS HAD REGULAR MAINTENANCE
issues.title: Power Train
issues.blurb: Most-reported area: 45 complaints (25%), with no crashes, fires, or injuries reported. Owners describe the car losing forward drive and needing transmission repairs.

issues.sample: WITHIN ONE WEEK OF DRIVING THE VEHICLE IT STALLED AS I ENTER ONTO  THE HIGHWAY. THE VEHICLE ALSO FEELS AS IF IT'S OUT OF BALANCE AND SHAKES AT SPEED OF 65 TO 70 MPH. AND THE  FORWARD  EMERGENCY BRAKING  SYSTEM WARNING LIGHT DISPLAY/ UNAVAILABLE FRONT RADAR OBSTRUCTION WARNING LIG
issues.title: Service Brakes
issues.blurb: Second most-reported: 40 complaints (22%), and the most safety-relevant category here with 3 crashes, 2 fires, and 1 injury. Owners report stalling and shaking at highway speed along with braking-system warnings.

issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: 32 complaints (17%), including 1 crash. Owners report electrical and wiring problems, in one case after water contact, with the car later failing to move.

issues.sample: JUST BEFORE I HIT 1000 MILES, THE FRONT COLLISION SENSOR STARTED BEEPING AT RANDOM TIMES WHETHER THE VEHICLE WAS STOPPED OR IN MOTION AND ULTIMATELY, IT HAD TO BE REPLACED. DEALERSHIP TOLD ME THEY HAVE SEEN THIS HAPPEN A LOT ON THE 2018 MODEL SENTRAS. ALSO, THE GUARD IN THE INSID
issues.title: Forward Collision Avoidance
issues.blurb: 24 complaints (13%), with 2 crashes and 1 injury. Owners report the front collision sensor triggering at random and sometimes needing replacement.

issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: 22 complaints (12%), including 2 fires and 1 injury. Owners report smoke from under the hood and the vehicle catching fire while driving.
